mnemonics.title: IKE Phases
mnemonics.content: Phase 1: Main Mode, Phase 2: Quick Mode

mnemonics.title: Main Mode Steps
mnemonics.content: 1. Propose IKE, 2. Accept proposal, 3. Send Diffie-Hellman public key, 4. Send nonce, 5. Send encrypted authentication data, 6. Verify authentication data

mnemonics.title: Aggressive Mode Steps
mnemonics.content: 1. Propose IKE, 2. Accept proposal, 3. Send Diffie-Hellman public key, 4. Send nonce

mnemonics.title: Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange
mnemonics.content: A method to securely exchange cryptographic keys between two parties

mnemonics.title: Main Mode with Preshared Keys
mnemonics.content: A variant of Main Mode that uses preshared keys instead of public key authentication
